allow: Bash(CLAUDECODE= claude -p "say hi in one word" 2>&1 | head -5)

Bash(node -e "const rl = require\('readline'\).createInterface\({input: process.stdin, output: process.stdout}\); console.log\(rl._refreshLine.toString\(\).slice\(0, 500\)\)" 2>&1 || node -e "const rl = require\('readline'\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(rl.Interface.prototype\).filter\(k => k.includes\('refresh'\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const rl = require\('readline'\); console.log\(typeof rl.moveCursor, typeof rl.clearLine, typeof rl.cursorTo\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('readline'\).then\(rl => { const out = process.stdout; out.write\('PROMPT LINE'\); out.write\('\\\\nline-1'\); out.write\('\\\\nline-2'\); rl.moveCursor\(out, 0, -2\); out.write\(' <CURSOR>'\); out.write\('\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n'\); }\)")
